lesson.menu_desc: Review + monthly results presentation combining there is / are, past simple, increase / decrease and will / going to from lessons 11-14 -- 30 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 15 -- Checkpoint 2 -- Presenting the Month's Results
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 15 -- Checkpoint 2

listenings.text: Hi Maisa, this is David. Here is a quick update about last month. There is a new chart in the report, and there are three columns with the numbers. Last week, I finished the summary and I called the client. Our sales increased. They are higher than last year. But costs went up too. The general result is good. Now I have a plan. I am going to check the numbers again, and I promise to send the final report by Friday. Thank you very much!

Hello, this is Sarah from the finance team. Let me tell you about my month. There is a big table on page two, and there are many figures in it. Yesterday, I finished my part and I closed a small deal. My sales decreased a little, so profits are lower than last year. But there is good news too. One product grew fast. My plan is simple. Tonight, I am going to write the summary, and I will send it on time. Have a great day!

extra_audio.text: Good morning, David. Here is my report for last month. There is a chart on the first page. Sales increased by ten percent. Profits are higher than last year. I am going to send the final numbers by Friday. Thank you very much.
